title: Bulk Blasting
description: Smelt a whole block of raw ore at once, and smelt stone & glass in the blast furnace!
body:
# Bulk blasting
Allows smelting raw iron, gold, and copper blocks into their respective ingot block forms in a blast furnace.  
Using the blast furnace is slightly more fuel efficient, as smelting each block uses 8 smelts worth of fuel but produces 9 ingots.  
Also adds blasting recipes for stone and glass, since those are blocks that are often needed in large quantities.
